extracted.title: AGT Customer Specific Operational Flow Order
extracted.description:
In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, Algonquin Gas Transmission, LLC (AGT) is issuing an Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 26 of the General Terms and Conditions of AGT's FERC Gas Tariff, effective immediately, for certain delivery point parties on the AGT system. AGT has contacted the affected parties.

This OFO does not affect the ability of AGT to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline.

During the effectiveness of this OFO, the notified parties must be balanced such that actual deliveries of gas out of the system must be equal to or greater than scheduled deliveries out of the system. The penalty shall apply to each dekatherm of actual delivery quantities that are less than scheduled quantities minus 250 Dth or 96% of scheduled delivery quantities.

The penalty will be equal to three times the arithmetic average of daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for "Algonquin, city-gates" for the day on which such violation occurred as indicated in AGT's General Terms and Conditions Section 26.8. In addition, AGT will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty except for primary firm no-notice nominations or shippers who can secure day ending Due Shipper supply for Due Pipe imbalances and Due Pipe supply for Due Shipper imbalances.

The individual OFO(s) will remain in effect until further notice.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

Please refer to the table below for the effected AGT operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Operational Area / Gas Day March 8 / Gas Day March 9 and until further notice:
- System Wide - All Customers: No OFO / No OFO*
- Customer Specific: NO OFO / OFO in Effect: No DS 4% / 250
- Hourly Customer Specific: No Hourly OFO / No Hourly OFO

*All imbalance payback must be coordinated through AGT's account representative. In the event uncoordinated imbalance payback occurs and it jeopardizes system operations, customer specific OFOs may be required.

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
